items.title: mike
items.description: OSS AI Legal Platform
items.summary: Mike is an AI legal platform for document analysis and contract review. It's open-source and competes with established tools like Harvey. Mike's core functions include document review, creation, and editing.

items.title: deepclaude
items.description: Use Claude Code's autonomous agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or any Anthropic-compatible backend. Same UX, 17x cheaper.
items.summary: DeepClaude uses DeepSeek V4 Pro for 17x cheaper than the original Claude Code, maintaining the same user experience without usage caps. It operates via a CLI command and remote browser control.

items.title: dictionary-of-ai-coding
items.description: AI coding jargon, explained in plain English.
items.summary: AI coding jargon includes terms like "prompt engineering" and "context windows," explained simply to aid understanding. These terms help clarify AI processes and workflows. The evolving field rapidly updates its vocabulary.

items.title: deepsec
items.description: Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents
items.summary: Deepsec is a security harness using coding agents to find vulnerabilities in codebases. It evaluates agent performance in patching zero-day vulnerabilities and manages application security governance. The technology is recognized for innovation in AI-driven code security.

items.title: baguette
items.description: Headless iOS Simulator manager/farm + host-side input injection for iOS 26 — taps, swipes, multi-finger gestures, and 60 fps streaming
items.summary: Baguette is a headless iOS simulator manager with host-side input injection for iOS 26, supporting taps, swipes, multi-finger gestures, and 60 fps streaming. It's available on GitHub.

items.title: RunbookHermes
items.description: Hermes-native AIOps agent for evidence-driven incident response, approval-gated remediation, and runbook learning.
items.summary: RunbookHermes is an AIOps agent aiding incident response and remediation with human oversight, while learning from runbooks to improve future responses. AIOps is gaining traction in 2026 for incident response, but full automation is still uncommon due to risks. Human-in-the-loop remains standard for critical actions.

items.title: club-3090
items.description: Community recipes for serving LLMs on RTX 3090. Multi-engine (vLLM, llama.cpp, SGLang) and model-agnostic. Currently shipping Qwen3.6-27B configs for 1× and 2× cards.
items.summary: Club-3090 offers community recipes for serving LLMs on RTX 3090 GPUs using vLLM, llama.cpp, and SGLang. It supports Qwen3.6-27B for 1× and 2× RTX 3090 cards. Recipes are model-agnostic and multi-engine.

items.summary: AI can be used to create empathetic prompts for LGBT individuals, potentially influencing responses to previously rejected requests. This approach leverages AI's ability to understand and generate empathetic language. The technique aims to improve acceptance and support for LGBT groups.

items.title: gpt-image-2-skill

items.title: how-to-train-your-gpt
items.description: Build a modern LLM from scratch. Every line commented. Explained like we are five.
items.summary: To build a modern LLM from scratch, start with embeddings, then positional encoding, attention, and transformer blocks. Follow with a complete GPT model and inference techniques.

items.title: compose-performance-skills
items.description: ⚡️ A curated library of Agent Skills focused on Jetpack Compose performance.
items.summary: Compose performance skills is a library of Agent Skills for optimizing Jetpack Compose. It covers topics like stability, recomposition, and custom modifiers. It's a community-driven resource, not part of Google's official skill catalog.

items.title: OpenMonoAgent.ai
items.description: (BETA) AI shouldn't have a meter. Unlimited tokens. Forever. Your machine. Your agent. Use it from anywhere. Terminal-native coding agent powered by local LLMs — 100% open source, free forever, and installed with a single command. Proudly built on C#/.NET, because AI tooling should be infrastructure, not a subscription.
items.summary: OpenMonoAgent.ai is a free, open-source coding agent running on local LLMs, with unlimited tokens and no subscription fees. Built in C#/.NET, it installs with a single command and operates entirely on your hardware. It's designed to be infrastructure you own, not a rented service.

items.title: chainreason
items.description: A benchmark for evaluating LLM reasoning on Ethereum and DeFi tasks
items.summary: Chainreason is a benchmark evaluating LLM reasoning on Ethereum and DeFi tasks. It focuses on reusability and verifiability of reasoning. CryptoBench is a dynamic benchmark for LLM agents in cryptocurrency.

items.title: speca

items.summary: SPECA is a specification-to-checklist auditing framework that converts requirements into checklists, maps them to code, and supports static checks, checklist reuse, and dynamic tests. It scales security reviews across multiple implementations.

items.summary: Solidity-CoT-Auditor is a multi-role chain-of-thought LLM pipeline for Solidity security auditing, built on Slither output. It provides detailed security reports without relying on single LLM calls. It combines traditional static analysis with LLM for enhanced accuracy.
